/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_attr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_barrier.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_barrierattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_cond.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_condattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_core.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_key.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_mutex.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_mutexattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_rwlock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_rwlockattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_pthread_spin.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_sched.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-pthread.dir/tests/test_sem.c.o" -o test_posix-pthread.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_posix-pthread.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libposix-pthread.a
